Description
neqsim.process.util.heattransfer
 

  • Uses of CompositeWallConduction in neqsim.process.util.heattransfer

    Methods in neqsim.process.util.heattransfer that return CompositeWallConduction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompositeWallConduction
    CompositeWallConduction.addLayer(String name, double thicknessM, double conductivity, double density, double specificHeat)
    Adds a material layer to the wall stack, ordered from the outer (fire-exposed) face inward.
    CompositeWallConduction
    CompositeWallConduction.initialize(double uniformTemperatureK)
    Builds the discretization grid and sets a uniform initial temperature in all nodes.
